title: cordiglottis breviscapa
intro: Cordiglottis breviscapa, also known as the dwarf cordiglottis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordiglottis breviscapa include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as promoting blood circulation and lowering blood pressure. Cordiglottis breviscapa can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, or taken in capsule form after being processed into a dried extract.
